channel.title: Download free software, update daily!

item.title: Download Q-Dir 12.56
item.description: Q-Dir is software to manage the entire file and folder on the computer, allowing to see file in same time 4 different positions (viewport quadro) while still maintaining all the standard features of the Explorer. It also provides a variety of management features, additional files included the filter file color-coding, layouts and columns can be customized, quick access to file and folder favorites and more. Other features of Q-Dir , including directory listings (.txt, .doc .html .csv),...

item.title: Download CopyWin 4.75
item.description: Reuschtools CopyWin is a versatile program designed to copy the contents of your Windows drive, including all files and programs, to another drive, USB or MicroSD card. This is especially useful for upgrading or replacing storage hardware, as it simplifies the migration process. The tool does not require installation; it can be used by running the executable file, but requires administrative rights to operate. CopyWin also offers features like incremental backups after the initial backup,...

item.title: Download Free Video Cutter Joiner 2026
item.description: Free Video Cutter Joiner is the easiest video cutter joiner software can cut large video file and remove unwanted parts like commercials, outtakes and trailers. Free Video Cutter Joiner works well with many file formats like AVI, MPEG, MP4, WMV, 3GP, FLV,etc. Features of Free Video Cutter Joiner Supporting any audio and video formats including AVI, MP4, FLV, WMV, MOV, VOB, 3GP etc Free Video Cutter Joiner also can join serval video files into MP4,AVI,FLV, WMV, MOV, VOB, MPG format...

item.title: Download FakeDriveCheck 4.75
item.description: FakeDriveCheck is a simple utility you can run to verify if your USB stick or MicroSD card is fake. It's easy to get and use, making it a good choice for anyone skeptical about the authenticity of their external storage. FakeDriveCheck Features Existing files will not be destroyed while the USB drive is verified. Super fast verification. No need to unplug and plug in. Hot Plug: FakeDriveCheck detects USB drives inserted after FakeDriveCheck is started.

item.title: Download ClassicMenu by Reuschtools 4.75
item.description: ClassicMenu by Reuschtools is a software tool designed for Windows that allows users to switch between the classic and the new context menu introduced in Windows 11. The tool allows the classic context menu to be enabled or disabled, which is useful for users who prefer the traditional full context menu over the newer compact version with fewer items. ClassicMenu is free, requires no installation (click to run), and is accessible from the Start Menu after installing Reuschtools. When...

item.title: Download SeekFast 6.7 Build 1
item.description: SeekFast has the ability to quickly search for specific text in all documents on your computer. SeekFast then sorts the results in a way that makes it easy to find the text you're looking for, see its context, and open the file that contains it. All you have to do is select a folder to search for and enter search words or phrases - you'll get all the sentences they appear in within seconds. This is especially useful if you need to find something quickly. SeekFast uses state-of-the-art...

item.title: Download Exacoustics GHOST 1.1.12
item.description: Exacoustics GHOST is a powerful and innovative synthesis plugin that uniquely combines Wavetable synthesis and Frequency Modulation (FM) synthesis into one integrated instrument. Released in August 2024 by Brisbane-based developer Exacoustics, the plugin quickly gained attention for its fresh approach and deep sound design capabilities. Key Features: Hybrid Synthesis Engine: Combines the flexibility of wavetable oscillators with the complexity and richness of FM synthesis. Six...

item.title: Download Creosys OBD Auto Doctor 5.3.2
item.description: Creosys OBD Auto Doctor is software for diagnostics, engine testing and performance monitoring of your car. It has a user-friendly interface that makes it easy to read Diagnostic Problem Codes and view car parameters and condition in real time. Features of Creosys OBD Auto Doctor Identify problems with your car Real-time data monitoring Make sure it's ready to test Start maintenance procedures Drive more economically.
